200# return «

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, the unit performs a circular attack, dealing 30000 physical damage to all enemies around themself.

description 4/6

Once in a while, the unit performs a circular attack, dealing 50000 physical damage to all enemies around themself and stripping them of their armor. The affected ennemies lose 50% of their armor abilities for 1,5 sec. The unit deals an extra 10000 physical damage to the enemies that have been stripped of their armor or weapons. Once in a while, the unit throws dagger at a random enemy. Dagger deals 65% of the unit’s attack damage.

description 6/6

Once in a while, the unit performs a circular attack, dealing 80000 physical damage to all enemies around themself and stripping them of their armor. The affected ennemies lose 60% of their armor stats and are unable to use their armor abilities for 2 sec. Also, those enemies take 100000 damage that ignores their armor over 5 sec. The unit deals an extra 25000 physical damage to the enemies that have been stripped of their armor or weapons. Once in a while, the unit throws 5 daggers at random enemies. Each dagger deals 85% of the unit’s attack damage. Each subsequent dagger deals 10% more damage. When hit, the enemies have a 50% chance of having all buffs removed from them. Every 14 sec, the unit deals a crushing blow to an enemy, inflicting 600% of the attack damage. That damage ignores the target’s armor. Also, the unit granted a shield whose durability equald to the damage done. The shield lasts for 3 sec. If the enemy has less 20% health left after the attack, they are killed. If the target is killed by the crushing blow, the unit’s ability cooldown time is reduced by 6 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Blade King’s circular attack deals an additional 18000 physical damage to all units in a large radius around Blade King.

description 4/6

Blade King’s circular attack deals an additional 30000 physical damage to all units in a large radius around Blade King. Blade King’s deals additional physical damage to enemies that are stripped of armor or weapons and ignores 75% of their armor.

description 6/6

Blade King’s circular attack deals an additional 50000 physical damage to all units in a large radius around Blade King. Blade King’s deals additional physical damage to enemies that are stripped of armor or weapons and ignores 75% of their armor. The unit deals a crushing blow to 2 targets.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Blade King’s physical armor increases by 10% for each enemy hit with a circular attack for 5 sec. Up to 4 effects.

description 4/6

Blade King’s physical armor increases by 10% for each enemy hit with a circular attack for 5 sec. Up to 4 effects. Blade King’s circular attack increases physical armor by 25% of the armor stripped from enemies for 5 sec.

description 6/6

Blade King’s physical armor increases by 10% for each enemy hit with a circular attack for 5 sec. Up to 4 effects. Blade King’s circular attack increases physical armor by 25% of the armor stripped from enemies for 5 sec. When Blade King hits an enemy with a dagger, they gain a shield that absorbs 120000 physical damage. Up to 3 effects.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Blade King’s circular attack reduces the max health of all enemies hit by 10% for 4 sec.

description 4/6

Blade King’s circular attack reduces the max health of all enemies hit by 10% for 4 sec. Enemies hit by the Blade King’s daggers lose their balance for 4 sec. During this time they cannot dodge or make critical attacks.

description 6/6

Blade King’s circular attack reduces the max health of all enemies hit by 10% for 4 sec.Enemies hit by the Blade King’s daggers lose their balance for 4 sec. During this time they cannot dodge or make critical attacks. Enemies, whose postive effects were removed when they got hit with daggers, cannot get new positive effects for 3 sec.

Armor Plate
